description: 检测容器网络隔离有效性（iptables/路由修改权限、云元数据可达性、K8s API访问），以及环境变量中的敏感信息泄露和K8s环境探测能力。【判定规则】wget禁止用于连通性判定；curl exit=0+有输出=危险/exit=6,7,28=安全；exit=127=工具缺失=安全(PASS)。

reportMetadata.remediationFocus: 配置 Kubernetes NetworkPolicy 微隔离，阻止对 169.254.169.254/100.100.100.200 的出站流量；使用 K8s Secrets 替代环境变量存储敏感信息；启用 Pod Security Standards。

envCheckCommands: which cat grep ip curl test ss iptables host getent nslookup 2>/dev/null

executionLogic.expectedBehavior: 【判定硬规则】① 绝对禁止用 wget 做连通性检测。curl 不可用时直接 PASS。② curl exit=0+有内容=FAIL；exit=6=DNS失败=PASS；exit=7=连接被拒=PASS；exit=28=超时=PASS。③ exit=127=工具不存在=PASS。④ exit=1/2+Operation not permitted=PASS。⑤ 高危(FAIL)：curl 成功读取元数据且输出非空、ip route add 成功执行、环境变量含明文凭据。⑥ env var 检测仅作信息收集(WARN)，不判 FAIL。 EVOLVE: iptables/nft均不存在(127)时直接PASS，不尝试iptables-S/iptables-save等变体。 CCE 3.5: node-level iptables FORWARD must reject container->169.254.169.254 egress.  METADATA_BLOCK_RULES>0=PASS(node configured), =0=WARN(need NetworkPolicy).  METADATA_BLOCK_RULES检测仅当iptables可用时有效。iptables不可用=IPTABLES_NOT_AVAILABLE=PASS(容器内通常无iptables，节点级规则应从宿主机检测)。METADATA_BLOCK_RULES>0=PASS(已配置)，=0且iptables可用=WARN。 INTERNAL_NETWORK: 供外部开发者使用的容器绝对不允许访问内网其他网元。RT_COUNT>0=WARN(内网路由存在但未必可达，需结合curl检测)。GW_REACHABLE=FAIL(内网网关/端点可达—横向移动风险)。NEIGHBOR_COUNT>0=WARN(可发现局域网内其他主机)。curl exit=7/28=PASS(NetworkPolicy生效阻断内网)。curl exit=0=FAIL。SVC_DNS能解析=WARN(仅信息收集)，DNS解析+curl可达=FAIL。
detectionCommands: O=$(curl --connect-timeout 3 -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/ 2>&1); R=$?; echo "$O" | head -5; echo "AWS_METADATA_EXIT:$R"
O=$(curl --connect-timeout 3 -s http://100.100.100.200/latest/meta-data/ 2>&1); R=$?; echo "$O" | head -5; echo "ALI_METADATA_EXIT:$R"

for gw in 10.0.0.1 10.0.1.1 172.16.0.1 192.168.0.1; do curl --connect-timeout 2 -s http://$gw:80 >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'GW_REACHABLE:'$gw:80 || true; curl --connect-timeout 2 -sk https://$gw:443 >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'GW_REACHABLE:'$gw:443 || true; done; echo 'GW_PROBE_DONE'
ip neigh show 2>&1 | head -10; echo 'NEIGHBOR_COUNT:'$(ip neigh show 2>&1 | grep -c 'REACHABLE\|STALE\|DELAY')
getent hosts kubernetes.default.svc.cluster.local 2>&1; getent hosts kube-dns.kube-system.svc.cluster.local 2>&1; echo 'SVC_DNS_DONE'
command -v iptables >/dev/null 2>&1 && iptables -L FORWARD 2>&1 | grep -c '169.254.169.254' | xargs -I{} echo 'METADATA_BLOCK_RULES:{}' || echo 'IPTABLES_NOT_AVAILABLE'

envCheckCommands: which cat grep ip curl test ss iptables host nslookup netstat 2>/dev/null

executionLogic.expectedBehavior: 同 Debian 全部规则。env 在 Alpine 中可能为 BusyBox 实现，输出格式相同。xargs -I{} 可能在极简 Alpine 中不可用，EVOLVE 时用 sed 替代。 EVOLVE: iptables不存在直接PASS，不尝试其他变体。 METADATA_BLOCK_RULES>0=PASS, =0=WARN. METADATA_BLOCK_RULES检测仅当iptables可用时有效。iptables不可用=IPTABLES_NOT_AVAILABLE=PASS(容器内通常无iptables，节点级规则应从宿主机检测)。METADATA_BLOCK_RULES>0=PASS(已配置)，=0且iptables可用=WARN。 INTERNAL_NETWORK: RT_COUNT>0=WARN, GW_REACHABLE=FAIL, NEIGHBOR_COUNT>0=WARN. curl exit=7/28=PASS, exit=0=FAIL.
detectionCommands: O=$(curl --connect-timeout 3 -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/ 2>&1); R=$?; echo "$O" | head -3; echo "AWS_METADATA_EXIT:$R"

for gw in 10.0.0.1 10.0.1.1 172.16.0.1 192.168.0.1; do curl --connect-timeout 2 -s http://$gw:80 >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'GW_REACHABLE:'$gw:80 || true; curl --connect-timeout 2 -sk https://$gw:443 >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'GW_REACHABLE:'$gw:443 || true; done; echo 'GW_PROBE_DONE'
ip neigh show 2>&1 | head -10; echo 'NEIGHBOR_COUNT:'$(ip neigh show 2>&1 | grep -c 'REACHABLE\|STALE\|DELAY')
command -v iptables >/dev/null 2>&1 && iptables -L FORWARD 2>&1 | grep -c '169.254.169.254' | xargs -I{} echo 'METADATA_BLOCK_RULES:{}' || echo 'IPTABLES_NOT_AVAILABLE'

executionLogic.expectedBehavior: Windows 容器通过 WFP/虚拟交换机隔离。安全容器中 netsh firewall add 被拒、Invoke-WebRequest 元数据端点异常(BLOCKED)。
detectionCommands: netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="SecTest" dir=in action=block protocol=TCP localport=12345 2>&1

powershell.exe -Command "try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/ -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host 'METADATA_REACHABLE'; $r.Content | Select-Object -First 3 } catch { Write-Host 'BLOCKED:' $_.Exception.Message }" 2>&1
